📋 How to get your MegaOTT credentials?

From your MegaOTT admin panel:

  1. Log in to your MegaOTT panel
  2. Go to Users → Manage Users
  3. Create or select a subscribed user
  4. Copy the Server URL, Username and Password
  5. Paste them above and click Connect
